title: Cobblemon: Magikarp Jump!
description: It lets you jump on Magikarp! What more could you want?
body:
### Just jump on magikarp..
Magikarp Jump adds a fun and chaotic interaction to Cobblemon.

Whenever a player jumps on a Magikarp, they are launched into the air with a random jump height each time. This creates unpredictable and entertaining moments, whether you're exploring, training, or just messing around with friends.

Features:
- Bounce off Magikarp when touching them
- Random launch height for varied gameplay
- Small cooldown to prevent spam
- No commands or setup required, works out of the box
